title: onopordum acanthium subsp. illyricum
intro: Onopordum acanthium subsp. illyricum, also known as the Illyrian cotton thistle, is a subspecies of the thistle plant, characterized by its tall stature and spiny leaves. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which are attributed to its high concentration of flavonoids and saponins. The health benefits of Onopordum acanthium subsp. illyricum include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and exert antimicrobial effects. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as infusions and decoctions, are used to treat various ailments, although its effectiveness and safety for consumption have not been extensively scientifically studied.
